RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0006 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: John Smith Date of Birth: 22/04/1971 SSN (tokenized): TKN-182091 Annual Income: $75,000 Employer: Umbrella Co Loan Amount: $44,000 Term (months): 48 Branch: Pune Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN19669AL Honda Model 3 2021 Hybrid CPO 36,000 Authorized Signature: John Smith
